title: US Substantial Presence Test (SPT)
notes: Weighted days = current year + 1/3 prior year + 1/6 second prior year, requiring >= 31 days in the current year. The matcher is exact=true: days in US territories (Puerto Rico, Guam, USVI, ...) do NOT count, matching the statute. Simplifications: exempt-individual days, medical-condition days, in-transit (<24h) days, and commuter exceptions are not modeled; the closer-connection exception is not modeled.
